technical_fit.notes: Role title mentions 'Data Science' and 'Business Analytics' — perfect alignment with Carlos's positioning. However, job description is minimal; cannot confirm Power BI, GA4, SQL, or AI component presence from posting alone. Assuming standard BI/analytics stack typical at Migros Bank.

contextual_fit.notes: Location (Wallisellen) is Carlos's current residence — excellent. Internship contract type matches perfectly (6-12 months). Critical concern: posting is in German (de) only; no English version noted. Carlos has A2 German (improving) but posting does not indicate English as working language or whether German B1+ is negotiable for an internship.

opportunity_fit.notes: Duration 6-12 months is ideal fit. Migros Bank is a tier-1 Swiss financial institution with strong brand and growth potential in fintech/analytics. No degree requirement stated (internship level). Industry is accessible; no clearance mentioned.

key_match_points: Exact location match (Wallisellen) — no relocation needed
Perfect contract structure (6-12 month internship) aligns with Carlos's search criteria
Migros Bank is a blue-chip employer with strong analytics capability and career trajectory
red_flags: Job posting language is German only; Carlos's German is A2 and may struggle with technical interviews or daily work without English support
Minimal job description provided — cannot confirm specific tools (Power BI, SQL) or AI component; may require follow-up with recruiter
Financial services sector may have compliance/background check requirements not visible in posting
top_jobs.suggested_angle: Position yourself as a multilingual, AI-fluent analyst ready to bridge business and data in a fintech context, emphasizing your cross-functional communication skills and German learning commitment while highlighting Power BI and analytics expertise.
top_jobs.job_summary_for_user: Migros Bank seeks a 6-12 month Data Science & Business Analytics intern in Wallisellen — your hometown. A prime opportunity at a major Swiss financial institution, though the German-only posting suggests German language may be important for the role. Clarify language requirements with recruiter before applying.

job.titulo: Praktikant Data Science in Business Analytics (alle) /​ 6-12 Monate
